BOLT.notes: #460 CLOSED (work landed in bectly out-of-loop 8d0fb22 — product-quick-edit.tsx 3 setState-in-effect sites eliminated). TOP PRIORITY: #461 [P1] split "use cache" try/catch/JSX in src/app/(shop)/page.tsx (audit C, docs/audits/codebase-sweep-2026-04-18.md line 109). Five sections have JSX inside try/catch: CategoriesSection (L79), plus 4 more at L254/L336/L391/L460 — they wrap both DB read AND JSX return in one try block. Fix pattern per section: keep 'use cache' + cacheLife + cacheTag at top; do DB read inside try, assign const data (or fallback value on catch); move JSX return OUTSIDE try block so it reads data directly; early-return fallback JSX on empty/error if needed. First two functions getNewProductsForPage (L23) + getFeaturedProductsForPage (L50) are data-only — no JSX in try, DO NOT TOUCH. Acceptance: lint drops ~76→~32 (the 44 no-jsx-in-try-catch errors gone), tsc clean, next build green, homepage renders identically (all 5 sections, same fallbacks, same cacheLife/cacheTag). Atomic single-file commit. DO NOT touch audit items D (admin Date hoists + entity escapes), E (uploadthing rename), F (dead export prune) — those are separate tasks. DO NOT modify cacheLife durations or cacheTag keys. After #461: no queued Bolt items — go idle and await next Lead cycle. Do NOT touch #367 Trace lane. Do NOT start Hetzner.
